untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order flow microstructure analysis: (1) Detection of 4+ consecutive same-side trades from specific counterparty - requires order-level data and counterparty identification not available in OHLCV indicators; (2) Participant-specific trade sequencing pattern - requires order book and trade history data; (3) Direction confidence assessment based on price action confirmation - subjective, requires real-time order flow interpretation. Available volume indicators (vol_ratio_20) cannot capture counterparty identity, trade direction sequencing, or client vs. algorithmic order distinction. This signal fundamentally requires granular order-level microstructure data beyond candlestick-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is a sophisticated order flow prediction strategy that exploits behavioral patterns at the microstructure level. The core insight (repeated same-side trading predicts continuation) requires tracking individual counterparty behavior across multiple trades. Standard OHLCV-based backtesting cannot reproduce this without order book and trade tape data. Used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for detecting elevated activity, but this is insufficient to capture the actual signal logic. A proper backtest would require: (1) order-level feed with counterparty IDs; (2) order direction classification; (3) rolling sequence detection of same-side orders; (4) time-weighted analysis within 5-minute windows.
